cer.latestNote: Latest PUBLISHED value. CER is published forward by BCRA: queried on 2026-06-10 with no date filter, the newest observation returned was fecha 2026-06-15. The value for the query date itself (2026-06-10) was 787.67389171873. This forward publication is what makes the t-10 habiles settlement convention operable.
cer.historyNote: Daily series, includes weekends/holidays (46 obs for 2026-04-26..2026-06-10), ascending by fecha.

a3500.descripcion: Tipo de cambio mayorista de referencia
a3500.identificationNote: API descripcion is "Tipo de cambio mayorista de referencia" (does not literally say A3500). Linkage to Comunicacion A 3500 confirmed: BCRA publishes this exact series as "Tipo de Cambio de Referencia Comunicacion A 3500" (bcra.gob.ar, com3500.xls) and the same API idVariable 5 was labeled "Tipo de Cambio Mayorista ($ por USD) Comunicacion A 3500 - Referencia" in API v3 (mirrored at lamacro.ar/variables/5). NOTE: BCRA approved a new A3500 calculation methodology (volume-weighted actual transactions instead of quote survey) effective 2026-01-01.
a3500.historyNote: Business days only (31 obs for 2026-04-26..2026-06-10), ascending by fecha. Pesos per USD.

tna.descripcion: Tasa de interes TAMAR de bancos privados

tea.descripcion: Tasa de interés TAMAR de bancos privados

relatedIds.135: Tasa de interes TAMAR de bancos publicos y privados, TNA (categoria Series.xlsm)
relatedIds.136: Tasa de interes TAMAR de bancos privados, TNA (duplicate of 44, categoria Series.xlsm, more decimals)
relatedIds.137: Tasa de interes TAMAR de bancos privados, TEA (duplicate of 45, categoria Series.xlsm, more decimals)

ipcMensual.descripcion: Variación mensual del índice de precios al consumidor
ipcMensual.note: INDEC national CPI monthly pct change as republished by BCRA. Monthly series dated to month-end (e.g. 2026-04-30 = April 2026 m/m inflation, 2.6%). May 2026 not yet loaded as of 2026-06-10. Related: id 28 = y/y variation (32.4% at 2026-04-30).

remInflacion12m.descripcion: Mediana de la variación interanual próximos 12 meses del índice de precios al consumidor del relevamiento de expectativas de mercado
remInflacion12m.note: Only REM series present in the monetarias v4 catalog: median expected y/y CPI inflation over next 12 months from the Relevamiento de Expectativas de Mercado (REM). 23.3% as of survey month 2026-05. Full REM dataset (monthly path, policy rate, FX expectations) is NOT in this API; it is published separately by BCRA (www.bcra.gob.ar REM page).

cerLagRule.description: CER-linked sovereign bonds (BONCER/LECER) adjust principal using CER with a 10-business-day lag ("t-10 habiles"). Verbatim clause from the issuance resolutions: "el saldo de capital de los bonos sera ajustado conforme al COEFICIENTE DE ESTABILIZACION DE REFERENCIA (CER) referido en el articulo 4 del Decreto N 214/02, informado por el BANCO CENTRAL DE LA REPUBLICA ARGENTINA, correspondiente al periodo transcurrido entre los DIEZ (10) dias habiles anteriores a la fecha de emision y los DIEZ (10) dias habiles anteriores a la fecha de vencimiento del servicio de interes o amortizacion de capital correspondiente." (Resolucion Conjunta 36/2016, BONCER 2021; identical wording in Resolucion Conjunta 9/2022 for LECER X16D2 / BONCER T2X4, TX26, TX28). Operationally: adjusted capital for a payment date P = VN x CER(P - 10 habiles) / CER(E - 10 habiles), where E is the emission date. By extension, the standard market convention for valor tecnico at settlement date t uses CER(t - 10 habiles) in the numerator; because BCRA publishes CER forward approximately 10 business days after each monthly CPI release (observed: on 2026-06-10 the API already returned CER through 2026-06-15), the CER applicable to any T+1 settlement is always already published. The lag clause lives in each instrument's issuance terms (resoluciones conjuntas of Secretaria de Finanzas y Secretaria de Hacienda), so per-instrument prospectus governs; all current BONCER/LECER checked use the identical 10-habiles wording. The CER index itself is defined by Decreto 214/2002 art. 4 (daily index from INDEC CPI, methodology in BCRA Com. A 3467).
cerLagRule.verification: Both sources fetched 2026-06-10; clause quoted verbatim from fetched text.

apiNotes.tls: Verified OK without -k from macOS curl on 2026-06-10 (HTTP 200 with certificate verification). -k may still be needed on systems missing the BCRA chain.
apiNotes.envelopeCatalog: {status:200, metadata:{resultset:{count,offset,limit}}, results:[{idVariable, descripcion, categoria, tipoSerie, periodicidad, unidadExpresion, moneda, primerFechaInformada, ultFechaInformada, ultValorInformado}]}
apiNotes.envelopeDetail: {status:200, metadata:{resultset:{count,offset,limit}}, results:[{idVariable, detalle:[{fecha:"YYYY-MM-DD", valor:number}]}]} -- NOTE v4 nests observations under results[0].detalle (v3 had flat results:[{fecha,valor}]). detalle is sorted DESCENDING by fecha (newest first).
apiNotes.envelopeError: {status:400, errorMessages:["..."]} with matching HTTP status (e.g. invalid id -> 400 "Parametro erroneo: Validar formato del id de la variable ingresada.").
apiNotes.pagination: Catalog has 1581 variables; default limit=1000, use ?limit=&offset=. Detail endpoint: default limit 1000 obs, hard max limit=3000 (limit=4000 returns 400 "El limite no puede superar los 3000 registros."). Date filters ?desde=YYYY-MM-DD&hasta=YYYY-MM-DD work; desde alone works and returns through latest published.
apiNotes.rateLimits: No rate-limit headers observed (no X-RateLimit-*, no Retry-After on 200s); no documented quota found. Responses carry an x-jws-signature header (JWS-signed payload). Content-Language: es-AR.
apiNotes.forwardPublication: CER (id 30) is published ahead of the calendar: on 2026-06-10 the newest observation was fecha 2026-06-15. Catalog field ultFechaInformada for id 30 said 2026-06-10 while the detail endpoint returned through 2026-06-15 -- do not rely on catalog ult* fields for CER freshness.
apiNotes.gaps: TAMAR/BADLAR exist as TNA ("porcentaje nominal anual") and TEA ("porcentaje efectivo anual") only; no TEM series exists in the catalog. Daily rate series (TAMAR/BADLAR) lag one business day (latest 2026-06-09 on 2026-06-10). A3500 has business days only; CER has all calendar days.
